fields.name: seo
fields.label: SEO
fields.description: Shown in browser tabs and search results. Aim for ~55–60 characters in the title and ~150–160 in the description.

fields.name: navigation
fields.label: Navigation labels
fields.description: Top navigation link text. Section anchors (#wisdom, #pathways, …) are fixed in the page.

fields.name: primaryCta
fields.label: Primary button
fields.description: Scrolls to the Offerings section.

fields.name: secondaryCta
fields.label: Secondary button
fields.description: Uses Booking link → Booking URL or email if set; otherwise scrolls to the contact form.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Hero image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Hero image alt
fields.description: Describe the image for screen readers.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo.

fields.name: body1Html
fields.label: First paragraph (HTML allowed)
fields.description: You can use simple HTML tags like <em>, <strong>, and <a href="…">.

fields.name: pathways
fields.label: Pathway cards
fields.description: The page renders exactly four cards in a 2×2 / row-of-four grid. Adding more or fewer will break the layout.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo.

fields.name: profileImage
fields.label: Profile image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo. Portrait orientation works best (4:5).

fields.description:

fields.name: values
fields.label: Shared values
fields.description: One value per item. Use the buttons to add, reorder, or remove items.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Questions
fields.description: Add, reorder, or remove FAQ items as needed.

fields.name: answerHtml
fields.label: Answer (HTML)
fields.description:
Wrap paragraphs in

…

. You can use , , and .

fields.name: individualCards
fields.label: Individual offerings
fields.description: Add, reorder, or remove cards as needed — the page renders one full-width row per item. Set a Badge to highlight a card with the rose accent treatment; leave it blank for the default outline style.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo.

fields.name: badge
fields.label: Badge (optional)
fields.description: e.g. "Active Enrollment". Leave blank to hide the badge.

fields.label: Description (HTML)
fields.description:
Wrap paragraphs in

…

. You can use , , and .

fields.name: groupCards
fields.label: Group & workshop offerings
fields.description: Add, reorder, or remove cards as needed — the page renders one full-width row per item. Set a Badge to highlight a card with the rose accent treatment; leave it blank for the default outline style.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image URL
fields.description: Paste a full https:// URL, or use a path like /uploads/file.jpg if the image lives in this repo.

fields.name: badge
fields.label: Badge (optional)
fields.description: e.g. "Active Enrollment". Leave blank to hide the badge.

fields.name: contactSection
fields.label: Contact form section
fields.description: Editable copy for the contact form that sits above the footer. The form itself is wired to Netlify Forms — submissions arrive as email notifications you configure in the Netlify dashboard (Site → Forms → Form notifications). Field names are fixed (name, email, topic, message); only the labels, placeholders, and surrounding copy are edited here.

fields.name: topicPlaceholder
fields.label: Topic field — placeholder option
fields.description: Shown as the disabled first option (e.g. "Choose one…").

fields.name: topicOptions
fields.label: Topic options
fields.description: One option per item. These appear in the dropdown and are submitted as the "topic" field value.

fields.name: reassurance
fields.label: Reassurance line (under the button)
fields.description: Short note about response time, privacy, etc.

fields.name: successHeadline
fields.label: Success — heading
fields.description: Shown after a successful submission.

fields.name: contact
fields.label: Booking link (optional)
fields.description: Optional shortcut for the hero "Get in touch" button and every offering CTA: if you set a Booking URL (Calendly, Cal.com, etc.) or an email, those buttons jump straight there instead of scrolling to the contact form. Leave both blank to send everyone to the form section above the footer.

fields.name: bookingUrl
fields.label: Booking URL
fields.description: Full https:// link (e.g. Calendly). Used by the hero "Get in touch" button and every offering CTA.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Contact email
fields.description: Used as a mailto: fallback if no booking URL is set.

fields.name: footer
fields.label: Footer
fields.description: The footer is for brand wrap-up only — the conversion CTA lives in the Contact form section above. Keep this short and warm.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
